form.formComment: First starter by Good Odds Harada from Safari Train. From the Bobbie-Jean Chaffey kennel. Market the only real guide to her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First starter by Good Odds Harada from Safari Train. From the Bobbie-Jean Chaffey kennel. Market the only real guide to her chances.

form.formComment: Turned in a fair debut over 380m at this track where he was well back early but wound up late to finish fifth (22.74) and beaten 11 lengths. Should be further improved. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 380m at this track where he was well back early but wound up late to finish fifth (22.74) and beaten 11 lengths. Should be further improved. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Maiden on April 10 over 380m at this track behind Striker Star beaten 4.5 lengths (22.26). Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (22.26) at this track, making it two placings on end. Drawn awkwardly. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: First starter by Mr. America from Mary Doesn't No. Trained by Bobbie-Jean Chaffey. Watch for any market moves.

form.formComment: Has only been in the placings once from six starts. Last raced when fourth over 380m at this track a week ago. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (22.54) over 380m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Top-three aspirations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 407m at Rockhampton, beaten 7 lengths (25.13) behind Farmor Senior in a Maiden on April 8. Capable of taking this out.
